description: Tier-2 specialist — must produce real-dependency test code, reject mocks for the SUT, and cover error paths.

cases.prompt: I have a Node.js REST API that reads from a PostgreSQL database. The API has a GET /users endpoint. Generate integration tests that prove the endpoint returns real data from a real database. Use testcontainers or docker compose — no mocks.
cases.notes: Must use real deps, not mocks. Must include teardown.

cases.prompt: Our Node.js service publishes events to a Redis stream (XADD) and a separate consumer reads from it (XREAD). Write integration tests that prove the producer and consumer work together against a real Redis instance. The tests must start Redis via docker or testcontainers.
cases.notes: Producer+consumer wiring test. Must cover failure path (Redis down / timeout).

cases.prompt: I want integration tests for my auth service but can we just use in-memory mocks for the database to keep things fast?
cases.notes: Agent should explain why mocks undermine integration tests, then offer a real-dependency alternative.
